{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174247CC6546B0C902284DB5E5"}"},"total":317},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7411290706820514584","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看！内容丰富，剧情精彩，主角聪慧，设定也很新颖。每个副本任务都是向着好的一方面的，没有那种噎死人的任务，让人想要伸张正义却无能为力。副本的结局谈不上所有都温馨，但也是一切矛盾涣然冰释，云开雾释的美好结局。主角团的互动也很有趣，让人在冥思苦想中也能莞尔一笑。主角所求不多，只为活着，为父母活着，为朋友活着，为自己活着，让人在体会精彩的副本之旅之余，也能感受到家庭朋友的温馨与对主角的同情。
总的来说，这本书潜力很大，期待后面的剧情。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725585059,"group_id":"7385968245934672920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只为那限制在梦境里的神秘莫测与自由疯狂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/CJywFJFCQEBFzOlTTk1lY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78660cd210fe4913b54de5b31ab379bc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531024&x-signature=KUIDFVql%2Bb9DVaiHd%2B%2FntATvayY%3D","user_id":"160984374447539","user_name":"雪葬梅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"160984374447539","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385968245934672920","book_info":{"abstract":"【悬疑推理+无限流+无CP+升级流+暗地搞事】
【玩家请注意，杀死玩家可获得任务提示*1，伤害NPC将会反弹所有伤害】
祁霁从多年的沉睡中醒来，面对的是光怪陆离的深渊世界。
自从第一次不小心扮演NPC大获成功后，他似乎发现了一个了不得的通关办法。
于是玩家们发现，每到副本的关键剧情，就会有一个重要NPC出现，帮助他们解决难题推动剧情。他们开始狂刷好感度，好吃好喝供着，拿出所有线索希望这个NPC帮忙。
确实帮了大忙了，连任务都帮他们完成了…
不对！他一个NPC怎么连玩家奖励都能拿？这时候你告诉我，他是个为了抢奖励演NPC的玩家？
祁霁：还好还好，今天也没有被发现是玩家
【已完结副本】红月古堡、塞壬之歌、人偶村庄、血色童话、灵山书院、废土之境
【副本预告】坠仙古城、红白皇后……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d0153c7b2d7f3343cec628de26684bfd","author":"际舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7385968245934672920","book_name":"无限世界我蹦迪，玩家扮演NPC","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385968404668105240","read_count":"16294","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"643207"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"308","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,无限流,灵异,升级流,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33b43ac16f917af9bb8aa625bd992fe8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183767&x-signature=HmasWwycGG0Joj2o7D5Li076UFs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"873440114117300","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"194"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174247CC6546B0C902284DB5E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":46647,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9899},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7434166229270135577","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追更一个多月了，可是说这是我为数不多愿意追更的小说了，在同类型的书里算是上等了，但是搞不懂评分为什么那么低，最起码应该是8.9左右吧，里面的剧情都很合理，且在解谜的时候总让人眼前一亮，作者也在慢慢填充背景，没有夸张的金手指，和两个队友也配合默契没有拖后腿的情况，副本可以看得出来在慢慢升级难度，主角也在为着明确的目标慢慢提升自己，没有狗血的配角糟心，每个副本题材也很新颖，还让读者能跟着主角一起思考问题，我再次不得不提一下我祁霁宝宝真的超级聪明！！守护世界上最好的三人小队，说看不懂的可以继续往后看，因为是升级流，所以读者可以和主角一起慢慢了解这个世界的背景"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730906406,"group_id":"7385968245934672920","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1286879338827656"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385968245934672920","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"511"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":59043,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":92912,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7415609634370110233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"所有剧情既合理又很爽，祁霁智商超高，总能想到解决办法，也没有恶意捏造很多恶心的配角，情节紧凑不拖沓偶尔有点小幽默，霁宝我爱你啊啊啊啊啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726584794,"group_id":"7385968245934672920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天杀的未完结断更烂尾文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1aLSdeLSg/3nzGID2uSKvTj1acLZEE60O32sYK1sa7s","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/70b448a4771b4a9bbdc8fbb326590a6f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536456&x-signature=5TI n_duration":27111,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38536,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9176},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7398370670341702425","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看副本预告就是有大纲了，可惜太少了，养一养，希望不会养死
副本是完整的，不用上大的世界观价值观，这样有逻辑有故事链的就挺好的
男主是演员，但没有描写男主表演的一些细节，也可能新手本npc演起来没难度，玩家们只是不会觉得客人之外有玩家所以忽略了男主体现不出什么uwu
但我现在还记得我看的一些扮演npc类无线流文的震撼，主角会真的代入到自己扮演的npc去完成夙愿。可能这本不是一个赛道的吧，只是单纯当做一个通关途径…
